name: unbound
description: Unbound — open Twitter clone with no censorship and creator stake

scripts.build: npm run build -w @unbound/core && npm run build -w @unbound/relay -w @unbound/aggregator -w @unbound/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n relay,web,agg -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @unbound/relay" "npm run dev -w @unbound/web" "npm run dev -w @unbound/aggregator"
